nodes.label: design ruling: audited layout defects (containment vs intrinsic sizing + card floor)
mechanism analysis — containment vs intrinsic sizing, four candidate fixes measured
nodes.accept: defect-probe.{html,mjs} in scratchpad; Chromium+WebKit outputs identical across all probe ids; shipped/conditional/counter-rule/boundary candidates each measured on toolbar+tiles+reflow compositions

nodes.label: defect-B re-attribution — card crush root cause + floor ruling evidence
nodes.accept: measured equalities c6=c7 (floor not binding under containment) and c22=c23 (floor irrelevant in wrap rows post-fix); c12 vs c13/c28 grid blowout 484.2 vs 200 (floor harmful in grids)

nodes.label: ADR-0100 record (Context/Decision/Consequences/Alternatives/Acceptance)
nodes.accept: python adr_check.py 0100-*.md exits 0; Status proposed; one decision with clauses incl. the card-floor disposition

nodes.label: owning-doc repairs shippable now (ADR-0016 reciprocal header line + README index row)
nodes.accept: adr_check C6 (indexed) + C8 (links resolve, supersession reciprocal) green on 0100 and 0016

nodes.label: regression-test + build-wave charter (in-record Acceptance section)
nodes.accept: Acceptance enumerates whole-shape browser legs w/ negative controls, both engines, named shipped pages/seeds, the host-surface sweep, and the grid-guard leg

nodes.label: handback to coordinator
nodes.accept: handoff block with the eight fields in order; doc-reviewer named as next; gates listed by command with verdicts

actions.label: explain the 0px collapse mechanically (size containment zeroes intrinsic sizes)
prove each fix candidate against realistic compositions in both engines
re-attribute the 38px tile crush to its root cause with measured equalities
rule on the card min floor with the grid-guard evidence
record the establishment re-home as one ratifiable decision with honest costs
keep ADR-0016/0096 contracts consistent (partial supersession + extends links)
define buildable acceptance: tests, site sweep, doc re-keys — without building
route the result for independent review (generator≠critic)

edges.why: the re-attribution equalities are probe outputs — n3 reads n2's measurements
the Decision's mechanism claims cite n2's computed-style proofs
the card-floor clause cites n3's equalities and blowout measurement
the regression legs are derived from the exact compositions n2 measured
the reciprocal 0016 line and index row cite the 0100 number and title n4 fixes
the handback reports the record's gate verdicts
the handback lists the repaired files
the handback names the build-wave owner for the charter
